title: Shell in talks with UAE's ADNOC for South Africa fuel outlet sale, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Shell ​is ⁠in advanced ‌talks with Abu ​Dhabi's state oil ​company ADNOC to ​sell its retail ⁠fuel stations in South Africa ​Gas

Shell ​is ⁠in advanced ‌talks with Abu ​Dhabi's state oil ​company ADNOC to ​sell its retail ⁠fuel stations in South Africa ​Gas ‌in a ⁠deal ⁠likely to ​be ‌valued ⁠at about $1 billion, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with ‌the matter.

Reuters could not ⁠immediately verify ​the report.

(Reporting ​by ‌Raechel Thankam ⁠Job ​in Bengaluru)
